creator: cschuber@uumail.gov.bc.ca
text:
Dag-Erling Smorgrav made the following comment on freebsd-stable.

	Everything journalists write is true, except when they write about
	something you know.

	Please add this profoundly put comment to the fortune database.

Fix: 

Everything journalists write is true, except when they write about
	something you know.

	Dag-Erling Smorgrav, June 1999, FreeBSD-Stable Mailing List
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
